data.body: Replace the current hard-coded non-Claude one-shot treatment with a capability-driven multi-agent session model. Persist a clean protocol for interactive agent sessions that normalizes prompt delivery, turn completion, session completion, follow-up prompting, inactivity watchdogs, process-group termination, and post-exit workflow-state validation. Decompose this into child knots for protocol design, shared runtime/interface work, and one implementation knot per agent CLI.
data.title: Support interactive sessions for Codex, OpenCode, Gemini, and Copilot
